entity.label: Hamonah
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Multitude, a name figuratively assigned to the place in which the slaughter and burial of the forces of Gog were to take place (Ezek. 39:16).

nodes.label: Hamonah
nodes.description: Multitude, a name figuratively assigned to the place in which the slaughter and burial of the forces of Gog were to take place (Ezek. 39:16).

verses.text: And also the name of the city shall be Hamonah. Thus shall they cleanse the land.
